rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SAM HOM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting (And For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions)
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, notwithstanding some minor misstatements in the supplement filed on 7/5/23. There was no exhibit attached to the proposed order, but in any event, there should not be an exhibit attached to a proposed order. [LRSF 14.35 I.6.b.] (There is no need to "respond" to issues regarding defective notice; a correct proof of service or proof of service of the correct notice should just be filed, not described in a supplement. When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.] This includes proposed orders.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSE RAUL COLINDRES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Approve Stipulation For Settlement Of Probate Code Section 850 Petition, Including Cancellation Of Deed And Amended Letters Of Administration To Authorize Administrator To Borrow Money With Loan Secured By Encumbrance Upon Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The administrator requests full IAEA authority, but no additional bond waiver signed by Raul Colindres is on file. 2) The petition requests an order declaring cancellation of the grant deed in question, in addition to an order approving the stipulation for settlement and retaining jurisdiction to enforce the settlement. Paragraph 20(G) of the stipulation obligates Raul Colindres to execute a new deed or other instrument to reconvey title to the estate. Wells Fargo and other lien holders have not been served and joined in the same manner required for a civil action to cancel a deed. 3) Paragraph 20(D)(ii) of the stipulation purports to obligate the clerk to cancel the grant deed already recorded. 4) A revised proposed order including the legal description of the property must be submitted if an order cancelling the grant deed is to be issued. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE REVOCABLE TRUST DECLARATION OF JOE LOUIE GARCIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. (Each petition must stand on its own and make all necessary disclosures, not rely on previous petitions. Notice issues or missing proposed orders should just be addressed by filing the proof of service of the correct notice or providing the proposed order, not narrating the actions to be taken to address the issues. When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.] This includes proposed orders. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])
